settings.text: below
Allergen Information
settings.content:
Allergen Information

We understand the importance of clear and transparent allergen information. We are committed to sharing accurate details about our products and their ingredients. While we take steps to ensure the quality and consistency of every item, we recommend that customers always review the product packaging and ingredient list prior to use, especially if they have any specific dietary sensitivities or allergy concerns.

Please note that manufacturing and packaging processes may vary depending on the product, and some items may be produced in facilities that also handle a range of other ingredients. Because of this, we always suggest referring to the most up-to-date information on the label and consulting a qualified healthcare provider when in doubt.

settings.heading: Advisory Information
settings.content:
Use this section to add important usage and advisory information for your product.

Include guidance on how to consume the product—for example, whether it should be taken with food or water, and if there’s a maximum daily intake. You can also outline dietary suitability (e.g. vegan, gluten-free), but encourage customers to always check the product label for the most accurate and up-to-date information, especially if they have allergies or specific dietary needs. This section is helpful for building trust and transparency with your customers.

settings.heading: Sustainability Information
settings.content:
Use this section to highlight your brand’s sustainability practices.

Share how your product is made with consideration for the environment—such as using responsibly sourced ingredients, recyclable or minimal packaging, and ethical supply chains. This is a great place to outline your ongoing efforts to reduce waste, plastic use, or carbon impact. Customers increasingly value transparency and eco-consciousness, so use this content to build trust and show your commitment to positive change.

settings.heading: Legal Information
settings.content:
Use this section to display important legal and safety information related to your product.

Include disclaimers about the accuracy and currency of product details, especially when it comes to ingredients, allergens, and nutritional values. Make it clear that customers should always refer to the physical packaging before consumption. This is also a good place to note any copyright restrictions on content reuse and to provide guidance for customers with allergies or dietary needs. If relevant, offer contact details for customer support or direct customers to the appropriate manufacturer for third-party products.

settings.text: More about this stand-out feature.

Emphasize specific features of the product. For example, highlight the use of premium ingredients and careful sourcing. Note its freshness, flavour, or nutritional value. Emphasize the craft, care, or methods that set it apart in terms of quality.

Explain how the product suits different dietary needs or occasions. Show how it fits into everyday routines—whether it’s a quick snack, part of a meal, or a post-workout boost. Highlight features like portion size, shelf life, or ease of preparation that make it versatile across different lifestyles.
Include a product video highlighting key qualities - such as how it’s made, served, or enjoyed.
